scenarioName: Change report labels without code changes

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Change report labels without code changes
    Given the report layout contract declares product-facing labels
    When a product owner changes a section title, field label, status label, or promotion label in the layout contract
    And the report generator runs
    Then report.md should render the updated labels
    And the underlying evidence fields should remain schema-validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Then report.md should render the updated labels
And the underlying evidence fields should remain schema-validated.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
